name: Edna Sey
bio: Singer, artist, songwriter and afro-activist. Over 10 years on stage, awards and a career that bridges Afrobeat and Soul.

name: Bigwé
bio: Queer and afro-diasporic artist with a sound that blends pop, bikutsi, zouk and Y2K R&B.

name: Astrid Jones
bio: Actress and singer from Madrid, originally from Equatorial Guinea. Soul, musical theatre and an international career.

name: Marga Mbande
bio: Singer and songwriter based in Barcelona, with a powerful voice and a clear commitment to afro-fusion and innovation.

name: Bren
bio: Songwriter, actress, rapper and dancer. An artistic language with no borders between music, body and word.

name: Bou
bio: Artist, producer and life coach with a project that crosses art, entrepreneurship and social advocacy.

name: Afrikemet
bio: A tribute to the great African orchestras of the '60s and '70s, fusing soukous, afrobeat, high life and African salsa.

name: DJ Owey
bio: Afro-Spanish DJ based in Barcelona. Fuses Afrobeat, Amapiano, Dancehall, Hip Hop and R&B.
